title: Welcome email test — Oregon State University via Rankett
html:
Inbox screenshot of a Rankett white-label welcome email from noreply@rankett.com sent under the brand "Oregon State University via Rankett" to test recipient John at Test Invitation Company — confirms the dashboard provisioning flow (login link, dashboard for chatgpt/anthropic claude/gemini/perplexity visibility, real-time implementation tracking) is wiring up. Test creds visible (trueinsightsai@gmail.com + auto-generated password — captured here as part of the test, not Yahir's real account).

TL;DR

  • Rankett's end-client onboarding email template uses the white-label format "[Agency] via Rankett."
  • Production sender noreply@rankett.com confirms transactional email infra live.
  • Dashboard promises real-time visibility scores across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity + implementation progress tracking.

rankett · ghost white label · ai visibility engine · osu · email deliverability
